title: matricaria turcomanica
intro: Matricaria turcomanica is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae), also known as a type of chamomile. The medicinal properties of Matricaria turcomanica include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and calming effects, which are attributed to the presence of essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Matricaria turcomanica include promoting relaxation, relieving anxiety and insomnia, soothing digestive issues, and reducing inflammation. Matricaria turcomanica is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, and is often used to treat minor skin irritations and wounds.
